basicDetails.implementingAgency: Directorate General Of Health Services, Government NCT Of Delhi

schemeContent.briefDescription: Delhi Arogya Nidhi (DAN) is a scheme to provide financial assistance upto ₹1.5 lacs to needy patients who have National Food Security Cards for the treatment of diseases in Government hospitals only.
schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The &quot;Delhi Arogya Nidhi (DAN)&quot; is a scheme implemented by the Directorate General of Health Services to provide financial assistance of up to ₹1.5 lacs to needy patients who have National Food Security Cards for treatment of diseases in Government hospitals only.
schemeContent.benefits_md: 1. Under the scheme, financial assistance of up to ₹1.5 lacs will be provided to needy patients who have National Food Security Cards for treatment of diseases in Government hospitals only.

children.text: The "Delhi Arogya Nidhi (DAN)" is a scheme implemented by the Directorate General of Health Services to provide financial assistance of up to ₹1.5 lacs to needy patients who have National Food Security Cards for treatment of diseases in Government hospitals only.
Under the scheme, financial assistance of up to ₹1.5 lacs will be provided to needy patients who have National Food Security Cards for treatment of diseases in Government hospitals only.
Fill out the form with all requisites details.
The photocopies of all documents are to be attached with the application and the original is to be brought at the time of submission of same for verification.
Applicant has to submit an undertaking for his signature verification as given in the application form.
Application to be submitted in Patient Welfare Cell, Directorate of Health Services, 6th Floor, F-17, Karkardooma, (Near Karkardooma Court), Delhi-110032.

applicationProcess.process_md:
**Step 01:** Visit the [official website](https://dgehs.delhi.gov.in/dghs/delhi-arogya-nidhi) to download the [Application Form](https://health.delhi.gov.in/sites/default/files/Health/generic_multiple_files/totalform.pdf) for Financial Aid.
**Step 02:** Fill out the form with all requisites details.
**Step 03:** The photocopies of all documents are to be attached with the application and the original is to be brought at the time of submission of same for verification.
**Step 04:** Applicant has to submit an undertaking for his signature verification as given in the application form.
**Step 05:** Application to be submitted in Patient Welfare Cell, Directorate of Health Services, 6th Floor, F-17, Karkardooma, (Near Karkardooma Court), Delhi-110032.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. Patients should have a National Food Security Card.
1. The patient must be a resident of Delhi and has to furnish domicile proof of residing in Delhi continuously for the last 3 years (prior to the date of submission of the application).
1. Treatment should be from the Government Hospital in Delhi.

children.text: Patients should have a National Food Security Card.
The patient must be a resident of Delhi and has to furnish domicile proof of residing in Delhi continuously for the last 3 years (prior to the date of submission of the application).
Treatment should be from the Government Hospital in Delhi.
